title: GOV.UK Policy Papers on Government Efficiency & Productivity

data.title: Warm Homes Plan
data.description: This plan sets out how we will cut energy bills and upgrade homes.

data.description: The Carbon Budget and Growth Delivery Plan sets out how the government meets its statutory carbon budgets and secure the benefits of this transition for people and businesses.

data.description: This framework helps analysts across government quantify benefits of digital and data programmes.

data.description: This memorandum provides information on NS&I’s budget as included within the 2024 to 2025 Main Estimates.

data.title: Financial Inclusion Strategy
data.description: The Financial Inclusion Strategy sets out the government’s approach to improving financial inclusion for underserved groups across the UK.
